records.code: proc sql; create table lnk as select distinct gvkey, lpermno, linkdt, linkenddt from lnk; quit;

records.code: proc sort data=temp; by gvkey fyear descending datadate; run;

records.code: select distinct a.*,b.date, b.ret, mean(abs(b.prc)*b.shrout/1000) as mktequity, sqrt(252)* std(b.ret) as ret_vol_12m,
records.explanation: SQL 查询语句：选择字段、连接数据库表、限制样本并定义公司年度聚合层级。
计算收益率或残差的均值、总量或标准差，形成年度收益和波动率指标。

records.code: from temp&i as a left join ret.dsf as b on a.lpermno=b.permno and a.datadate-366<=b.date<=a.datadate
records.explanation: SQL 查询语句：选择字段、连接数据库表、限制样本并定义公司年度聚合层级。

records.code: data ret_vol&i (drop = sum_log_ret); set ret_vol&i; stock_ret_12m=exp(sum_log_ret)-1; run;

records.code: model exret = mktrf smb hml umd;
records.explanation: 定义超额收益对市场、SMB、HML 和动量因子的回归模型。
